---
created: "2026-03-22T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0c-milestone-1
key: sv0c-milestone-1
state:complete
tags:
    - sv0
    - sv0c
    - milestone-1
    - compiler
title: "milestone 1: sv0c bootstrap compiler (SML/NJ)"
type: task
---

# milestone 1: sv0c bootstrap compiler (SML/NJ)

## purpose

build the complete sv0 bootstrap compiler in SML/NJ. when milestone 1 is
complete, sv0c can read `.sv0` source files and produce C99 source code,
which `cc` compiles to native binaries.

this is the foundation for everything that follows -- self-hosting,
the bytecode VM, the LLVM backend, and the crypto/kernel use cases.

milestone 1 is complete when:
- sv0c compiles simple sv0 programs (bindings, functions, control flow,
  pattern matching, basic types, contracts) to C
- runtime contract checks are emitted as C assertions
- the module system resolves imports within a project
- error reporting includes source spans with highlighted snippets
- the test suite covers each compiler pass independently

## dependencies

/require: sml
/require: cc
/require: bash

## configuration

/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc
/env: BUILD_DIR=sv0c/build
/env: SRC_DIR=sv0c/src
/env: TEST_DIR=sv0c/test

## prerequisite: formal specification

the compiler implements against the formal specification in sv0doc/.
ensure milestone 0 is complete before starting.

/assert: test -f $SV0DOC_ROOT/grammar/sv0.ebnf
/assert: test -f $SV0DOC_ROOT/type-system/rules.md
/assert: test -f $SV0DOC_ROOT/contracts/semantics.md
/assert: test -f $SV0DOC_ROOT/memory-model/ownership.md
/assert: test -f $SV0DOC_ROOT/keywords/reference.md

## phase 1: project scaffolding and error infrastructure

/include: task/sv0c-project-setup.Rmd

/capture: SETUP_STATUS
/assert: test "$SETUP_STATUS" != "FAIL"

/include: task/sv0c-error-reporting.Rmd

/capture: ERROR_REPORTING_STATUS
/assert: test "$ERROR_REPORTING_STATUS" != "FAIL"

## phase 2: frontend (source -> typed AST)

the frontend transforms source text through four passes, each building
on the output of the previous one.

### lexer (source text -> token stream)

/include: task/sv0c-lexer.Rmd

/capture: LEXER_STATUS
/assert: test "$LEXER_STATUS" != "FAIL"

### parser (token stream -> untyped AST)

/include: task/sv0c-parser.Rmd

/capture: PARSER_STATUS
/assert: test "$PARSER_STATUS" != "FAIL"

### name resolution (untyped AST -> resolved AST)

/include: task/sv0c-name-resolution.Rmd

/capture: RESOLVER_STATUS
/assert: test "$RESOLVER_STATUS" != "FAIL"

### type checker (resolved AST -> typed AST)

/include: task/sv0c-type-checker.Rmd

/capture: TYPECHECKER_STATUS
/assert: test "$TYPECHECKER_STATUS" != "FAIL"

## phase 3: contract analysis (typed AST -> annotated AST)

/include: task/sv0c-contract-analyzer.Rmd

/capture: CONTRACT_STATUS
/assert: test "$CONTRACT_STATUS" != "FAIL"

## phase 4: backend (annotated AST -> sv0-IR -> C source)

### IR definition and lowering

/include: task/sv0c-ir.Rmd

/capture: IR_STATUS
/assert: test "$IR_STATUS" != "FAIL"

### C code generation

/include: task/sv0c-c-backend.Rmd

/capture: CBACKEND_STATUS
/assert: test "$CBACKEND_STATUS" != "FAIL"

## phase 5: integration testing

integration scenarios live under `sv0c/test/integration/` (per-directory or
single file). multi-file projects are built with `sv0c --project <dir>`
(all `*.sv0` in the directory, sorted). the companion script compiles each
fixture to C, links with `sv0_runtime.c`, runs the binary, and checks the
process exit code. structs use a free function instead of `impl` methods
until method dispatch is in scope; the generics scenario is monomorphic
until `<T>` is type-checked.

/run: 01-verify-sml-setup.sh
/run: 02-integration-test.sh

## milestone completion check

/assert: test -f $SRC_DIR/main.sml
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/lexer
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/parser
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/ast
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/name_resolution
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/type_checker
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/contract_analyzer
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/ir
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/backend/c
/assert: test -d $SRC_DIR/link

/ai: summarize the state of milestone 1. report:
     - which compiler passes are implemented and tested
     - which sv0 language features are supported
     - what test coverage looks like
     - known limitations and open issues
     - readiness for milestone 2 (bytecode VM backend)
